title: Implement Meeseeks Quick-Task Interface
description: Build a quick-task popup triggered by keyboard shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl+M). Meeseeks-themed input for rapid task creation that spawns a temporary agent, completes the task, and self-destructs. Show Meeseeks avatar with cyan theme. Tasks are ephemeral (not persisted as tickets) unless user chooses to save.
acceptance_criteria: Cmd/Ctrl+M opens floating Meeseeks popup centered on screen
Popup has cyan (#5bcefa) accent theme with Meeseeks avatar
Text input with placeholder 'I'm Mr. Meeseeks! Look at me!'
Enter spawns agent with task, shows progress spinner
Agent output streams below input in collapsible panel
On completion, shows result with Copy and Save as Ticket buttons
Animation: Meeseeks appears with pop-in, disappears with poof
agent_output: Meeseeks modal with quick task buttons, task input, file targeting, and animated spawn sequence.
